title: Green Finance: Sowing the Seeds of China’s Next Wave of NPLs
dek: A review of how China’s green-finance expansion could shape the next cycle of credit quality and distressed-asset opportunities.
keyFindings: Green-finance policy can accelerate credit deployment into strategic sectors.
Fast expansion can create pockets of underwriting risk and delayed stress realization.
Private-credit and NPL-resolution capabilities remain critical as projects mature.

paragraphs: This issue is presented in ShoreVest’s unified print format for consistency across the China Debt Dynamics archive.
For source-reference continuity, this page provides a concise formatted edition while legacy downloadable files remain available in the repository.

disclaimer: This letter expresses the views of the author as of the date indicated and such views are subject to change without notice.
